## Inspector ID

`object_fields`

## Layer

collection

## Purpose

A data dictionary over item frontmatter: per-field presence, types, cardinality, and common values.

## Usage

Inspectors emit evidence: counts and distributions, for the reader to judge. Run this one with:

```
katalyst inspect <target> --inspector object_fields
```
